gitCommit.subject: feat(word-magic): remove dead code WordMagicButton + word-magic-api [M4]
gitCommit.body:
feat(word-magic): remove dead code WordMagicButton + word-magic-api [M4]

- Delete WordMagicButton.tsx (not imported anywhere — architecture changed to global toggle)
- Delete word-magic-api.ts (invokeWordMagic() not called anywhere)
- WordMagicBadge.tsx preserved (used in ProductCard)
- Zero TypeScript errors introduced in own code

Architecture note: Word Magic now uses global toggle in Header (useWordMagicStore)
instead of per-product on-demand generation. Dead components from old architecture removed.
